Obby Builder

Build a ridiculous platforming stage, then try to beat it. Place traps, springs, movers, and tricky jumps to make your own mini chaos course.
Mode
Use FTGH (Drone) or Arrows to move, Space to jump, Shift to dash, S to slash, R to reset, E to toggle build/play.
🖱️ Drag in Build mode to pan camera.
History
Press M to undo, N to redo. Max 20 steps.
Character
💾 Save Progress
Your progress auto-saves in the browser, but you can back it up to a file in case you clear your browser data.
Upgrades 🏦 0
Reach the 🏁 Goal to bank 🪙 level coins — they reset on death! Spend banked coins on upgrades.
Cosmetic Shop 🏦 0
Spend 🪙 coins to unlock visual flair.
✨ COSMIC COIN SHOP ✨ 🪙 0
Collect ✨🪙 Cosmic Coins scattered throughout levels — they persist forever. Spend them on exclusive cosmic items no regular coin can buy.
📦 Mystery Boxes 🏦 0
Spend coins to open boxes and discover cosmetic loot. Higher tiers = rarer rewards.
Collection
✦ GODLY COSMETIC MYSTERY BOXES ✦ 🏦 0
Three new themed mystery boxes. Each box contains 20 block skins, 10 backgrounds, and a secret 5% Godly character chance when opened.

Existing / Default Background

🎨 Skin Boxes 🏦 0
Unlock character skins and world backgrounds!

Collection
📭 Character Boxes 🏦 0
Unlock brand-new characters not found in the base roster! Each box drops a character you don't have yet.
Box Exclusive Characters
🔮 Omen Boxes 🏦 0
Fate's gamble — cosmetics AND exclusive characters lurk within. ⚠ rumor: something hides in every box
Omen Collection
🕳️ RUINOUS SINGULARITY CRATE 🏦 0
A standalone absurd-price mystery box. Every reward is strictly Godly or Exotic.
Ruinous Singularity Collection
✦ PRESTIGE SHOP ✦ 🏦 0
Direct purchase of the rarest items in existence. Prismatic and Godly tier only. These prices are not a joke.

Earn 1 ticket per 1,000 coins of gambling profit.
Only profits count — losses don't subtract tickets.

⚡ — EXOTIC CHARACTERS — ⚡
💠 PRESTIGE COSMETICS
Owned prestige items. Click to equip or unequip.
✦ PRESTIGE MYSTERY BOXES ✦
Gambling for the elite. These boxes include Prismatic and Godly rewards. The Ruinous Singularity Crate minds its own business up top.
💠 Owned From Boxes
⚠ THE ALLEY enter at own risk
A shady corner. Roll five dice. Win big. Lose everything. Your call.
✨ COSMIC ARCADE skill > luck
Wager ✨🪙 Cosmic Coins on skill-based mini-games. Win to double up — lose your bet.
🏆 Milestones
Complete challenges to earn bonus 🪙 coins!
Enemies
Drop on defeat:
Select an enemy then click the world to place it. Enemies activate in Play mode!
Place Item
Click the world to place. Delete tool removes blocks. Right-click also deletes.
Select & Edit
Drag to box-select. Then drag selection to move it, or use Rotate.
Place Player
Tap anywhere on the world to set a temporary spawn. On death/win, you'll return to build mode.
Ghost Replay
When ON, records your runs. On death, previous runs replay as ghosts!
Save & Share
Export saves your level as a .json file. Share it or load it later!
Legend
Solid block = safe platform
Spike = hurts on contact
Spring = launches upward ↕️
Angled Spring = launches diagonally ↗️↖️
Mover = sliding platform
Ice = slippery floor
Bouncer = extra strong spring
🌬️ Wind Zone = pushes player
🧱 Crumble Block = falls & respawns
🚩 Checkpoint = saves respawn point
🌀 Teleport = warps between pads (A ↔ B)
⚡ Dash Charge = collect to dash!
🔁 Dash Refill = stand to recharge dashes
Goal = finish line (1x1)
🧱 Wall Jump: Jump while touching a wall!
🗝️ Key = collect to unlock doors
🚪 Door 1/2/4 = teleport after collecting keys
🔴 Laser Gate = Deadly beam (No dash invuln!)
🔘 Pressure Plate = Activates nearby lasers
⚔️ Breakable Wall = Only broken by Swordsman Battle Mode
🔴 Saw ↔️/↕️ = Patrols horizontally or vertically — deadly!
💨 Fast Zone = Amplifies movement speed in direction pressed
🔶 Slow Zone = Drags you to a crawl
🟢 Sticky = Slows you way down on contact
→ Conveyor = Pushes you to the right
🌋 Lava = Instant death, no dash invuln
🟣 Trampoline = Massive bounce from any landing
👻 Phantom = Only solid when you're standing still
↕️ Gravity Flip = Reverses gravity while inside
☠️ Thorn = Kills from above, safe from sides
☁️ Cloud = Only solid from above (pass through below)
🟠 Bumper = Knocks player away in all directions
⭐ Warp = Flings you forward at high speed
🧗 Wall Slide = Press into a wall while falling to slow descent
✨ NEW BLOCKS
🪞 Mirror = Reverses your horizontal speed on side contact
🏖️ Sand = Slows movement, soft landing
🧲 Magnet = Pulls you toward its center
🟣 Portal L = Shoots you rightward at high speed
🔵 Portal R = Shoots you leftward at high speed
⛏️ Drillable = Takes 2 stomps to break through
🪢 Zipline = Grabs you and carries you right fast
💫 Pulse = Flings you upward every 2 seconds
🪙 Coin = Collect for fun! (counter tracked)
❤️ HP = Restores 1 HP (max 3)
🛢️ Oily = Extreme speed, near-zero stopping
❄️ Freeze = Briefly encases you in ice on touch
🔮 Repulsor = Slow but powerful push away
🍄 Mushroom = Mini trampoline bounce from above
🌉 Bridge = Only solid when you have 0 dashes!
👁️ Ghost Zone = Pass through all blocks inside
↘️ Slope Down = Accelerates slides rightward, kills leftward momentum
↗️ Slope Up = Accelerates slides leftward, kills rightward momentum
🔲 Half Block = Click top half of tile = ceiling slab · Click bottom half = floor slab · Players can slide under either
← One-Way Left = Only solid when approaching from the left
→ One-Way Right = Only solid when approaching from the right
↓ One-Way Down = Only solid from below — pass through falling from above
🛷 SLIDING / CROUCHING: Hold ↓ while still = crouch · Hold ↓ while running = slide. Slide is faster initially, decays slowly on flat, accelerates on matching slopes. Jump out of either for a 1.3× height bonus! Toggle in ⚙️ Settings.
👾 ENEMIES (place in build, fight in play)
🎁 Enemy Drops: select a drop before placing — 🗝️Key · 🪙×5 Coins · ⚡All Dashes · ❤️Full HP
👾 Walker — patrols, chases on sight
🐸 Jumper — leaps toward you periodically
🦇 Flyer — hovers, ignores gravity
🔫 Shooter — stationary, fires aimed shots
🐗 Charger — winds up then dashes at full speed
🛡️ Shielder — protected front, hit from behind
🎾 Bouncer — ricochets unpredictably
👻 Ghost — invincible while phasing
💥 Bomber — walks close then 2s fuse explosion
💀 Mini-Boss — high HP, spread shots at half HP
🆕 NEW ENEMIES
🧙 Necromancer — high HP, periodically summons skeleton minions to fight for it
🗿 Titan — huge HP, slow, smashes ground to send shockwaves
🧛 Vampire — dashes through solid tiles, heals a small amount when it hits you
🃏 Trickster — spawns decoy clones, teleports away when hit
🔮 Oracle — predicts your position, fires homing projectiles
😤 Berserker — normal until low HP, then goes berserk (extreme speed + damage aura)
👁️ Phantom II — splits into 3 weak clones when first hit; clones must all be destroyed
💥 BOSS ENEMIES
👹 Brute — 65 HP, massive slow brawler; ground slams send shockwaves and throws boulders
🧊 Glacier — 35 HP, frost shell absorbs 1 hit per 4s; fires ice shards that slow you
🌪️ Tempest — 30 HP, hovering wind spirit; 15% chance to dodge-dash away when struck
🐍 Serpent — 45 HP, lunging slitherer; 20% chance to coil on hit, reducing knockback received
💀 Lich — 38 HP, floating sorcerer; 15% chance to blink (teleport) away when struck
👊 Universal Punch (all chars): press S — 1 dmg, 0.6s stun, 1s cooldown. Brawler uses their own combo instead.
🥊 Brawler: press S to attack — Smash Bros-style moves! Ground combo (5-hit), Dash attack (burst from dash), Aerial combo (in-air). Hold a direction key while pressing S to change the move variant: neutral, forward (A/D), back (opposite of facing), up (W/↑), or down (↓ arrow only). Jump or land to cancel end-lag and chain into the next move!
🔥 Form Switcher: press S to attack — directional moves per form! Hold direction + S for different attacks. Press S again during the glowing ring to trigger a follow-up! 🔥Flame=high damage turret | ❄️Frost=fast chains | ⚡Storm=stun stacking + ⚡chain lightning on kill | 🪨Stone=max knockback + tracking boulder on launch
⚡ Conduit: press S to attack — directional moves (ground & air)! Earn forms through skillful play: 🔵Overload=deal 40 total dmg (50% dmg boost) | 🟠Grounded=Spike Tide drag 3x (range x2) | 🟣Resonance=fill Resonance Meter by varying moves (no cooldowns) | 🔴Collapse=beam locked 8s (triple beam). Forms trigger automatically!
⚡🛡️ REACT SYSTEM: Gain 1 charge every 5s (max 3). Auto-DODGE dashes you clear + 2s invuln. Auto-PARRY reflects projectile back (1–8 dmg) + 1s invuln!
⚙️ Game Settings
Tweak gameplay mechanics to your liking. Settings are saved automatically.
🏃 Movement
🛷 Sliding
Hold ↓ while running to slide. Faster initial burst, decays on flat ground, accelerates on downslopes.
↓ Hold while still → Crouch · Hold while running → Slide
Jump out of crouch/slide = 1.3× height boost · Release ↓ on flat ground to stand up
⛰️ Slope Natural Roll
Slopes gently push you downhill even without sliding.
🎨 Visual
🔲 Show Grid
White tile grid lines on the canvas.
📳 Screen Shake
Camera shakes on hits, dashes, and explosions.
📊 FPS Counter
Shows live frames-per-second on the canvas.
👁️ HUD Opacity
How visible the top-left info panel is.
100%
HiddenFull
🪟 Sidebar Opacity
See through the panel while playing.
100%
GhostSolid
🎵 Music Volume
Background music for Build and Play mode.
50%
SilentFull
🧱 New Blocks
↘️ Slope Down — high-left to low-right
Sliding right accelerates · sliding left kills speed instantly
↗️ Slope Up — low-left to high-right
Sliding left accelerates · sliding right kills speed instantly
